lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Hey, [player name], would you like to come and perform in a mime show?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I'd love to do a mime show.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: You need to copy the mime's performance, then you'll be returned to where you were.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm busy.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Hey, [player name], would you like to come and solve a maze for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I like exploring mazes.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Reach the maze centre as fast as possible. The faster you are, the better your reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm busy.

sections.title: Standard dialogue - Hand out item version

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Ah, so you are there. I hoped you would talk to me, I get so lonely. Here, have a present! I must be going now though.

sections.title: If the event is not yours

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Sorry, I'm trying to speak to someone else, but [he/she/they] seems to be ignoring me.

sections.title: If the player completed the event or is in a zone where the random event isn't allowed

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: [player name]!

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Hello? [player name]?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Talk to me, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: [player name]? Are you there?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: I'd like to talk to you, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Maybe later.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: I'm sorry, but you are no use to me.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Here, take this. But tell no one I was here.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Well done! It's time to take your reward!

lines.speaker: Mysterious Old Man
lines.text: Well done! I have new information to share with you.
